There aren't many Japanese people that can use English well.

en: "I'm studying Japanese." "Really? Cool!"

en: "I'm studying Japanese." "Really? Cool!"

Who's the person who wrote this essay? There's no name.

ja_transcribed: トムはジャンクフードをすんごいたくさん[食|た]べるんだ。

Tom eats a lot of junk food.
